members.name: AddIndex
members.summary: Adds a vertex to index array if you are using indexed vertices. Does not need to be called before adding vertices.

members.name: AddTriangleFan
members.signature: public void AddTriangleFan(PackedVector3Array vertices, PackedVector2Array uvs, PackedColorArray colors, PackedVector2Array uv2s, PackedVector3Array normals, Plane[] tangents)
members.summary: Inserts a triangle fan made of array data into [Mesh] being constructed. Requires the primitive type be set to [constant Mesh.PRIMITIVE_TRIANGLES].

members.name: AddVertex
members.summary: Specifies the position of current vertex. Should be called after specifying other vertex properties (e.g. Color, UV).

members.name: AppendFrom
members.signature: public void AppendFrom(Mesh existing, int surface, Transform3D transform)
members.summary: Append vertices from a given [Mesh] surface onto the current vertex array with specified [Transform3D].

members.name: Begin
members.summary: Called before adding any vertices. Takes the primitive type as an argument (e.g. [constant Mesh.PRIMITIVE_TRIANGLES]).

members.name: Clear
members.summary: Clear all information passed into the surface tool so far.

members.name: Commit
members.signature: public ArrayMesh Commit(ArrayMesh existing, int flags)
members.summary: Returns a constructed [ArrayMesh] from current information passed in. If an existing [ArrayMesh] is passed in as an argument, will add an extra surface to the existing [ArrayMesh]. The [param flags] argument can be the bitwise OR of [constant Mesh.ARRAY_FLAG_USE_DYNAMIC_UPDATE], [constant Mesh.ARRAY_FLAG_USE_8_BONE_WEIGHTS], or [constant Mesh.ARRAY_FLAG_USES_EMPTY_VERTEX_ARRAY].

members.name: CommitToArrays
members.summary: Commits the data to the same format used by [method ArrayMesh.add_surface_from_arrays], [method ImporterMesh.add_surface], and [method create_from_arrays]. This way you can further process the mesh data using the [ArrayMesh] or [ImporterMesh] APIs.

members.name: CreateFrom
members.signature: public void CreateFrom(Mesh existing, int surface)
members.summary: Creates a vertex array from an existing [Mesh].

members.name: CreateFromArrays
members.signature: public void CreateFromArrays(Array arrays, int primitiveType)
members.summary: Creates this SurfaceTool from existing vertex arrays such as returned by [method commit_to_arrays], [method Mesh.surface_get_arrays], [method Mesh.surface_get_blend_shape_arrays], [method ImporterMesh.get_surface_arrays], and [method ImporterMesh.get_surface_blend_shape_arrays]. [param primitive_type] controls the type of mesh data, defaulting to [constant Mesh.PRIMITIVE_TRIANGLES].

members.name: CreateFromBlendShape
members.signature: public void CreateFromBlendShape(Mesh existing, int surface, String blendShape)
members.summary: Creates a vertex array from the specified blend shape of an existing [Mesh]. This can be used to extract a specific pose from a blend shape.

members.name: Deindex
members.summary: Removes the index array by expanding the vertex array.

members.name: GenerateLod
members.signature: public PackedInt32Array GenerateLod(float ndThreshold, int targetIndexCount)
members.summary: Generates an LOD for a given [param nd_threshold] in linear units (square root of quadric error metric), using at most [param target_index_count] indices.

members.name: GenerateNormals
members.summary: Generates normals from vertices so you do not have to do it manually. If [param flip] is [code]true[/code], the resulting normals will be inverted. [method generate_normals] should be called [i]after[/i] generating geometry and [i]before[/i] committing the mesh using [method commit] or [method commit_to_arrays]. For correct display of normal-mapped surfaces, you will also have to generate tangents using [method generate_tangents]. [b]Note:[/b] [method generate_normals] only works if the primitive type is set to [constant Mesh.PRIMITIVE_TRIANGLES]. [b]Note:[/b] [method generate_normals] takes smooth groups into account. To generate smooth normals, set the smooth group to a value greater than or equal to [code]0[/code] using [method set_smooth_group] or leave the smooth group at the default of [code]0[/code]. To generate flat normals, set the smooth group to [code]-1[/code] using [method set_smooth_group] prior to adding vertices.

members.name: GenerateTangents
members.summary: Generates a tangent vector for each vertex. Requires that each vertex already has UVs and normals set (see [method generate_normals]).

members.name: GetAabb
members.summary: Returns the axis-aligned bounding box of the vertex positions.

members.name: GetCustomFormat
members.summary: Returns the format for custom [param channel_index] (currently up to 4). Returns [constant CUSTOM_MAX] if this custom channel is unused.

members.name: GetPrimitiveType
members.summary: Returns the type of mesh geometry, such as [constant Mesh.PRIMITIVE_TRIANGLES].

members.name: GetSkinWeightCount
members.summary: By default, returns [constant SKIN_4_WEIGHTS] to indicate only 4 bone influences per vertex are used. Returns [constant SKIN_8_WEIGHTS] if up to 8 influences are used. [b]Note:[/b] This function returns an enum, not the exact number of weights.

members.name: Index
members.summary: Shrinks the vertex array by creating an index array. This can improve performance by avoiding vertex reuse.

members.name: OptimizeIndicesForCache
members.summary: Optimizes triangle sorting for performance. Requires that [method get_primitive_type] is [constant Mesh.PRIMITIVE_TRIANGLES].

members.name: SetBones
members.summary: Specifies an array of bones to use for the [i]next[/i] vertex. [param bones] must contain 4 integers.

members.name: SetColor
members.summary: Specifies a [Color] to use for the [i]next[/i] vertex. If every vertex needs to have this information set and you fail to submit it for the first vertex, this information may not be used at all. [b]Note:[/b] The material must have [member BaseMaterial3D.vertex_color_use_as_albedo] enabled for the vertex color to be visible.

members.name: SetCustom
members.signature: public void SetCustom(int channelIndex, Color customColor)
members.summary: Sets the custom value on this vertex for [param channel_index]. [method set_custom_format] must be called first for this [param channel_index]. Formats which are not RGBA will ignore other color channels.

members.name: SetCustomFormat
members.signature: public void SetCustomFormat(int channelIndex, int format)
members.summary: Sets the color format for this custom [param channel_index]. Use [constant CUSTOM_MAX] to disable. Must be invoked after [method begin] and should be set before [method commit] or [method commit_to_arrays].

members.name: SetMaterial
members.summary: Sets [Material] to be used by the [Mesh] you are constructing.

members.name: SetNormal
members.summary: Specifies a normal to use for the [i]next[/i] vertex. If every vertex needs to have this information set and you fail to submit it for the first vertex, this information may not be used at all.

members.name: SetSkinWeightCount
members.summary: Set to [constant SKIN_8_WEIGHTS] to indicate that up to 8 bone influences per vertex may be used. By default, only 4 bone influences are used ([constant SKIN_4_WEIGHTS]). [b]Note:[/b] This function takes an enum, not the exact number of weights.

members.name: SetSmoothGroup
members.summary: Specifies the smooth group to use for the [i]next[/i] vertex. If this is never called, all vertices will have the default smooth group of [code]0[/code] and will be smoothed with adjacent vertices of the same group. To produce a mesh with flat normals, set the smooth group to [code]-1[/code]. [b]Note:[/b] This function actually takes a [code]uint32_t[/code], so C# users should use [code]uint32.MaxValue[/code] instead of [code]-1[/code] to produce a mesh with flat normals.

members.name: SetTangent
members.summary: Specifies a tangent to use for the [i]next[/i] vertex. If every vertex needs to have this information set and you fail to submit it for the first vertex, this information may not be used at all. [b]Note:[/b] Even though [param tangent] is a [Plane], it does not directly represent the tangent plane. Its [member Plane.x], [member Plane.y], and [member Plane.z] represent the tangent vector and [member Plane.d] should be either [code]-1[/code] or [code]1[/code]. See also [constant Mesh.ARRAY_TANGENT].

members.name: SetUv
members.summary: Specifies a set of UV coordinates to use for the [i]next[/i] vertex. If every vertex needs to have this information set and you fail to submit it for the first vertex, this information may not be used at all.

members.name: SetUv2
members.summary: Specifies an optional second set of UV coordinates to use for the [i]next[/i] vertex. If every vertex needs to have this information set and you fail to submit it for the first vertex, this information may not be used at all.

members.name: SetWeights
members.summary: Specifies weight values to use for the [i]next[/i] vertex. [param weights] must contain 4 values. If every vertex needs to have this information set and you fail to submit it for the first vertex, this information may not be used at all.

values.name: CUSTOM_MAX
values.summary: Used to indicate a disabled custom channel.

values.name: CUSTOM_RGBA8_SNORM
values.summary: Limits range of data passed to [method set_custom] to signed normalized -1 to 1 stored in 8 bits per channel. See [constant Mesh.ARRAY_CUSTOM_RGBA8_SNORM].

values.name: CUSTOM_RGBA8_UNORM
values.summary: Limits range of data passed to [method set_custom] to unsigned normalized 0 to 1 stored in 8 bits per channel. See [constant Mesh.ARRAY_CUSTOM_RGBA8_UNORM].

values.name: CUSTOM_RGBA_FLOAT
values.summary: Stores data passed to [method set_custom] as full precision floats, and uses all color channels. See [constant Mesh.ARRAY_CUSTOM_RGBA_FLOAT].

values.name: CUSTOM_RGBA_HALF
values.summary: Stores data passed to [method set_custom] as half precision floats and uses all color channels. See [constant Mesh.ARRAY_CUSTOM_RGBA_HALF].

values.name: CUSTOM_RGB_FLOAT
values.summary: Stores data passed to [method set_custom] as full precision floats, and uses only red, green and blue color channels. See [constant Mesh.ARRAY_CUSTOM_RGB_FLOAT].

values.name: CUSTOM_RG_FLOAT
values.summary: Stores data passed to [method set_custom] as full precision floats, and uses only red and green color channels. See [constant Mesh.ARRAY_CUSTOM_RG_FLOAT].

values.name: CUSTOM_RG_HALF
values.summary: Stores data passed to [method set_custom] as half precision floats, and uses only red and green color channels. See [constant Mesh.ARRAY_CUSTOM_RG_HALF].

values.name: CUSTOM_R_FLOAT
values.summary: Stores data passed to [method set_custom] as full precision floats, and uses only red color channel. See [constant Mesh.ARRAY_CUSTOM_R_FLOAT].

values.name: SKIN_4_WEIGHTS
values.summary: Each individual vertex can be influenced by only 4 bone weights.

values.name: SKIN_8_WEIGHTS
values.summary: Each individual vertex can be influenced by up to 8 bone weights.

constants.name: CUSTOM_RGBA8_UNORM
constants.summary: Limits range of data passed to [method set_custom] to unsigned normalized 0 to 1 stored in 8 bits per channel. See [constant Mesh.ARRAY_CUSTOM_RGBA8_UNORM].

constants.name: CUSTOM_RGBA8_SNORM
constants.summary: Limits range of data passed to [method set_custom] to signed normalized -1 to 1 stored in 8 bits per channel. See [constant Mesh.ARRAY_CUSTOM_RGBA8_SNORM].

constants.name: CUSTOM_RG_HALF
constants.summary: Stores data passed to [method set_custom] as half precision floats, and uses only red and green color channels. See [constant Mesh.ARRAY_CUSTOM_RG_HALF].

constants.name: CUSTOM_RGBA_HALF
constants.summary: Stores data passed to [method set_custom] as half precision floats and uses all color channels. See [constant Mesh.ARRAY_CUSTOM_RGBA_HALF].

constants.name: CUSTOM_R_FLOAT
constants.summary: Stores data passed to [method set_custom] as full precision floats, and uses only red color channel. See [constant Mesh.ARRAY_CUSTOM_R_FLOAT].

constants.name: CUSTOM_RG_FLOAT
constants.summary: Stores data passed to [method set_custom] as full precision floats, and uses only red and green color channels. See [constant Mesh.ARRAY_CUSTOM_RG_FLOAT].

constants.name: CUSTOM_RGB_FLOAT
constants.summary: Stores data passed to [method set_custom] as full precision floats, and uses only red, green and blue color channels. See [constant Mesh.ARRAY_CUSTOM_RGB_FLOAT].

constants.name: CUSTOM_RGBA_FLOAT
constants.summary: Stores data passed to [method set_custom] as full precision floats, and uses all color channels. See [constant Mesh.ARRAY_CUSTOM_RGBA_FLOAT].

constants.name: CUSTOM_MAX
constants.summary: Used to indicate a disabled custom channel.

constants.name: SKIN_4_WEIGHTS
constants.summary: Each individual vertex can be influenced by only 4 bone weights.

constants.name: SKIN_8_WEIGHTS
constants.summary: Each individual vertex can be influenced by up to 8 bone weights.
